narrative:
North Olmsted-02-C (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,217 registered voters, with 59.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.2%, a clear Democratic lean of 11.8 percentage points.
